payload.author: claude
payload.body: DONE (subagent + integrated). scope remote set/show (.scope/remote.json - committed, no secrets by design), scope projects list/create, scope sync now flagless (resolution: flags > env SCOPE_REMOTE/SCOPE_PROJECT > remote.json) with a --project alias. Live-smoked against a real hosted hub with Postgres: flagless sync converged (pushed 1, pulled 2); 401/no-remote error paths verified. 9 new tests.
